caption: A video captures a gaming interface themed around autumn, featuring a large red banner with a stylized white "U1" logo set against a background of pumpkins, orange leaves, and wooden fences. The top left corner displays the text "HARVEST PRESENT". In the upper right, game statistics show "LV 19" and "(90)". A man with blond hair, wearing a dark blue t-shirt and a headset, is visible in a small picture-in-picture window in the lower left, gesturing with his hands while speaking. At the bottom of the screen, menu options include "UK/UNMARK", "ITEMS ALL", and "BACK". As the sequence progresses, the interface remains static until the final frame, where a large, semi-transparent orange and purple leaf graphic slides across the screen from the left, partially obscuring the central "U1" logo and the background.
